entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange offering spot and derivatives trading, wallets, listings, and related services. It launched in December 2019 and continued publishing new listings and product updates in 2026.
entity.notes: Current first-party announcements dated through June 2026 show ongoing listings and product updates. HEI uses the December 28, 2019 launch date preserved by multiple exchange-profile sources.

events.title: Azbit Exchange launched
events.description: Azbit entered public operation as a centralized cryptocurrency exchange offering spot trading and wallet services.
events.notes: Two independent exchange-profile sources preserve the same launch date.

events.title: Azbit introduced composite crypto-index futures
events.description: Azbit added synthetic futures instruments based on baskets of crypto assets.
events.notes: Recorded as a recent product milestone confirming continuing exchange operation.

evidence.title: Azbit exchange profile
evidence.notes: Exchange profile records a launch date of December 28, 2019.

evidence.title: Azbit exchange security profile
evidence.notes: Independent profile corroborates the December 28, 2019 launch date and Seychelles registration.

evidence.title: Azbit Help Center and announcements
evidence.notes: Current first-party help center exposes exchange announcements, listing notices, deposits, withdrawals, spot, and futures guidance.

evidence.title: New! Crypto indexes
evidence.notes: First-party announcement documents the launch of composite crypto-index futures in May 2026.

evidence.title: Listing Alert: GREENCOIN (GEC)
evidence.notes: Recent first-party listing notice confirms deposits, trading, and withdrawals were still being opened in June 2026.
